title: [lichen_l2.c:1062] k_mutex_init return ignored after documented failure
description: In lichen_l2_reinit_after_abort() line 1062-1064, k_mutex_init() return value is checked but on failure, only a LOG_ERR is emitted and the function continues. The function is documented as best-effort recovery, but the comment 'RX may deadlock' suggests this could leave the system in a worse state than before. Consider adding a return value to propagate the error, or documenting more clearly that callers should reboot if this fails.
close_reason: Fixed: k_mutex_init failure now triggers k_panic() instead of continuing with unrecoverable state
